top_signals.title: Taiwan Authorities Search Evergreen Marine Premises
top_signals.summary: Taipei prosecutors and the Investigation Bureau searched Evergreen Marine Corp.’s premises on Monday morning as part of a probe into suspected insider trading, according to multiple media reports.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Fifa reverses suspension of star US striker after call from Trump
top_signals.summary: Belgium cries foul after governing body clears Folarin Balogun to play World Cup match

top_signals.title: Fighting yen psychology is a losing battle
top_signals.summary: Turning the currency around, never easy at the best times, has just become harder given the renewed embrace of the greenback.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: King Charles just got a lot more treasure
top_signals.summary: Charles' mother Queen Elizabeth II began paying tax only after a public outcry at the government's decision to pay for expensive repairs to Windsor Castle after a fire in 1992.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
